{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Aethertech mask
| introduced = lh-02-the-engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The narrator previously wore an [[Aethertech mask]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c12">''The Engineer'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Varic]] uses a low-grade [[Aethertech mask]] to hide his face from scans.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c46">''The Engineer'', chapter 46</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon artifacts]]
